allowed.name: kline_to_stock_board_current
allowed.caveat: stock_board_data is current mapping only; check catalog flags

allowed.name: kline_to_margin_detail_same_day
allowed.caveat: margin data freshness must be disclosed when stale

allowed.name: kline_to_stock_moneyflow_same_day
allowed.caveat: stock moneyflow is unit 万元 and may be short-history/stale

allowed.name: kline_to_stock_moneyflow_yi_same_day
allowed.caveat: semantic view is normalized to 亿元 but may be short-history/stale

allowed.name: toplist_to_topinst_same_day
allowed.caveat: aggregate institution rows before stock-level claims

allowed.name: ths_daily_to_ths_moneyflow_same_day
allowed.caveat: use common overlapping dates; disclose stale THS daily data

allowed.name: ths_daily_to_ths_moneyflow_yi_same_day
allowed.caveat: use common overlapping dates; disclose stale THS daily data

allowed.name: research_stock_to_kline
allowed.caveat: report_date is publication date; quarter is forecast period

forbidden.name: dc_to_ths_board_code_or_name
forbidden.reason: DC board codes and THS board codes are not directly joinable; fuzzy name matching must be explicit exploratory work

forbidden.name: market_sentiment_to_stock_or_board_ranking
forbidden.reason: finance.sentiment_index is market-level, not stock/sector-level sentiment
